commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Other Nebo. We find no first mentioned; but in the ancient Latin edition, Nebo occurred instead of Geba, ver. 30. See 1 Esdras ii. 29. Septuagint and Arabic omit, "the other. "This Nebo may be Nob, or Nobe, in the tribe of Benjamin. (Calmet)
